entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A multipurpose cereal crop used worldwide as a major forage crop.

entities.name: DHURRIN
entities.description: A cyanogenic glycoside found in the vegetative shoot tissues of sorghum that is harmful to livestock.

entities.name: VEGETATIVE SHOOT TISSUES
entities.description: The parts of the sorghum plant where dhurrin is located.

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals that are fed sorghum as fodder and can be harmed by cyanogenic glycosides.

entities.name: HYDROGEN CYANIDE POTENTIAL
entities.description: The potential of tissues to produce hydrogen cyanide, measured in ppm.

entities.name: WELL-WATERED
entities.description: The environmental condition under which hydrogen cyanide potential was estimated.

entities.name: ICSR 14001
entities.description: A sorghum genotype exhibiting high hydrogen cyanide potential of 511 ppm.

entities.name: ICSV 93046
entities.description: A sorghum genotype exhibiting hydrogen cyanide potential of 443 ppm and high expression of dhurrin biosynthesis genes.

entities.name: CSH 24 MF
entities.description: A sorghum genotype exhibiting the lowest hydrogen cyanide potential of 364 ppm among the studied genotypes.

entities.name: DHURRIN BIOSYNTHESIS PATHWAY GENES
entities.description: Genes responsible for the synthesis of the cyanogenic glycoside dhurrin.

entities.name: BIOINFORMATIC TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to retrieve and characterize the sequence information of dhurrin biosynthesis pathway genes.

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing the expression patterns of dhurrin biosynthesis pathway genes across different genotypes.

entities.name: CYP79A1
entities.description: A specific gene in the dhurrin biosynthesis pathway showing varied expression across genotypes.

entities.name: CYP71E1
entities.description: A specific gene in the dhurrin biosynthesis pathway showing high expression in ICSV 93046.

entities.name: UGT85B1
entities.description: A specific gene in the dhurrin biosynthesis pathway showing high expression in ICSV 93046.

entities.name: HYDROGEN CYANIDE
entities.description: The toxic substance produced by the dhurrin biosynthesis pathway.

entities.name: GENE EDITING
entities.description: A potential technique to target key genes of the dhurrin pathway to provide safe feed for livestock.
